sources.name: Nature Quantum IC
sources.query: "cryogenic CMOS" OR "cryo-CMOS" OR "qubit readout" OR "qubit control" OR "quantum controller" OR "readout integrated circuit" OR "single-shot readout" OR "dispersive readout"
sources.notes: Broad quantum-control and readout query across Nature family.
